evidence_policy.implementation: Only the fixed local HEAD and files read from it
evidence_policy.public_context: Official GitHub metadata and OpenAI documentation are context only

scope.repository_scale: 101 Rust crates; approximately 690524 production Rust lines by bounded find/wc scan

parallel_agent_note: Reference skill requires subagents for module analysis. No Agent/subagent tool was available in this runtime; the main agent performed the bounded analysis and records this as a process limitation.
